treatment_information.dosage_or_details: Emergency procedure to stop intraperitoneal hemorrhage
treatment_information.treatment_response: Bleeding temporarily stopped, followed by jaundice and acute pancreatitis

treatment_information.specific_treatment: ligation of the hepatic artery and gauze packing
treatment_information.dosage_or_details: Second laparotomy to definitively stop bleeding
treatment_information.treatment_response: Patient discharged one month later in good condition
Nodules observed, initially misdiagnosed as steatosis
Confirmed liver adenomatosis with numerous nodules

treatment_timeline.event: Second laparotomy with ligation of the hepatic artery and gauze packing
Systematic ultrasound and CT scans showing nodules

patient_outcome.final_status: Asymptomatic with normal liver function test results
patient_outcome.recovery_timeline: Discharged one month after surgery in good condition
